meta.title: Users | Admin
meta.description: Manage accounts, access mode, and passwords.

title: Users
subTitle: Account operations: view status, adjust availability, reset passwords.

search.placeholder: Search by email or display name

tooltip.cannotChangeOwnReadOnly: You cannot change read-only for your own account. Use another admin.
tooltip.cannotChangeOwnStatus: You cannot change status for your own account. Use another admin.
tooltip.cannotResetOwnPassword: You cannot reset your own password from here.

disableUser.title: Disable this user?
disableUser.content: Disable 「{label}」. The user may not be able to sign in (per system policy).

setReadOnly.title: Set read-only account?
setReadOnly.content: Enable read-only for 「{label}」: only GET requests after sign-in.

unsetReadOnly.title: Remove read-only?
unsetReadOnly.content: Disable read-only for 「{label}」: restore write access.

resetPassword.title: Reset password for this user?
resetPassword.content: Generate a new password for 「{label}」. Share only over a secure channel; do not display in public.

toast.copyFailed: Copy failed. Copy the password manually.

resetPassword.title: Password reset
resetPassword.body: Temporary password for 「{label}」. Shown once only; share securely before closing.
resetPassword.warning: Do not send via public chat groups. Ask the user to change password after first sign-in.

hint.lockDistributed: Login failure lock is in-process state; in multi-instance deployments the list may not match the node that enforced the lock.
